name: mutagen (Python Audio Metadata Library)

performance.notes: File I/O bound; reads only tag headers, not full audio data

agent_readiness.notes: Read and write audio metadata tags. from mutagen.mp3 import MP3. from mutagen.id3 import ID3, TIT2, TPE1, TALB. audio = MP3('song.mp3'). print(audio.info.length). tags = ID3('song.mp3'). print(tags['TIT2']). tags['TIT2'] = TIT2(encoding=3, text='New Title'). tags.save(). from mutagen.flac import FLAC. flac = FLAC('song.flac'); flac['title'] = ['My Song']; flac.save(). from mutagen.mp4 import MP4. mp4 = MP4('video.m4a'). from mutagen.ogg import OggVorbis. from mutagen.easyid3 import EasyID3. easy = EasyID3('song.mp3'); easy['title'] = ['Title']; easy['artist'] = ['Artist']. Formats: MP3/ID3, FLAC, OGG, MP4/M4A, AIFF, APE, WavPack, Opus.

gotchas: ID3 tags are complex — EasyID3 simplifies but limits access to raw frames
GPL-2.0 license — incompatible with proprietary software distribution
ID3v2 frame names are cryptic (TIT2, TPE1, TALB, etc.)
MP4 tag keys differ from ID3 (use '©nam' for title in MP4)
Reading corrupt files may raise exceptions — always handle errors
best_when: Reading and writing audio metadata (MP3, FLAC, OGG, MP4)
Music library management tools and media organizers
Batch tag editing scripts for audio collections
avoid_when: Read-only metadata needs (use tinytag — simpler, MIT license)
Audio playback or processing (not an audio library)
summary: mutagen reads/writes audio metadata for MP3, FLAC, OGG, MP4, and more. from mutagen.easyid3 import EasyID3; tags = EasyID3('song.mp3'); tags['title'] = ['T']; tags.save(). from mutagen.mp3 import MP3; audio.info.length. ID3 raw frames: tags['TIT2'] = TIT2(encoding=3, text='T'). GPL-2.0. Best for music library tools. tinytag for read-only simpler API.
